headline: US Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Futures Fall On Renewed Energy And Inflation Worries
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Tuesday, Mar, 3 2026 US stock futures are pointing lower this morning, with E-mini S&P 500 contracts down about 1.5% and Nasdaq 100 futures down roughly 1.9%, as investors react to a fresh mix of energy and inflation worries. Government bond yields across Europe are sitting near recent highs, with the UK 10 year at 4.4% and German 10 year at 2.77%, which signals concern that higher energy costs could keep inflation pressures alive for longer. At the...

headline: Luxury stocks slump as Middle East conflict risks one of the sector’s 'few bright spots’
summary: The Middle East has been one of the few bright spots in a sector that is struggling to get sales back on track.

headline: Estee Lauder (EL) Loses 8.5% After Dividend Ex-Date
summary: We recently published 10 Firms Facing a Rough March So Far. The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE:EL) was one of the worst performers on Monday. Estee Lauder slashed its share prices by 8.48 percent on Monday to finish at $100.19 apiece, as investors unloaded portfolios following the record date of its next dividend payment, while […]
